proposed_title: TBD — pending IEEE OA paper selection #068

doi_evidence.proposed_doi: TBD — collect from official publisher page or DOI registry during OA review
doi_evidence.notes: DOI evidence alone is not enough for OA figure extraction.

publisher_page_evidence.proposed_source_url: TBD — must be official OA publisher page, author page, or institutional repository
required_actions: record official PDF availability if any
publisher_page_evidence.notes: Do not use Sci-Hub, pirated PDFs, or paywalled-only PDFs.

required_actions: check author or institutional repository version
record rights statement and version type
confirm repository copy is legally hosted
repository_oa_evidence.notes: Repository OA evidence may differ from publisher license evidence.

license_evidence.license_candidate: TBD — must be CC BY / CC BY-NC / publisher-permitted OA / author repository OA
accepted_license_examples: author/institutional repository OA with permitted analysis use
required_actions: record no-derivatives / non-commercial limitations when present
license_evidence.notes: A license candidate is not a final permission decision.

required_actions: confirm figure extraction is allowed for analysis/gallery/RAG metadata
decide whether images can be hosted or only referenced
permission_evidence.notes: Public gallery display and RAG storage may have stricter requirements than private structural analysis.

required_actions: check caption and article for third-party material notices
exclude or seek permissions if third-party status is unclear
third_party_material_evidence.notes: Third-party elements can invalidate apparent article-level reuse permission.

manual_reviewer_notes.notes: Offline scaffold only. Live DOI/OA/license verification is required before any new extraction or public hosting.
